updates.summary: May 2026 data refresh — all importers run, DB current as at 10 May 2026.

new_operational.name: Collie Battery
new_operational.note: Both Stage 1 (219 MW) and Stage 2 (341 MW) operational July 2025. WA/WEM project — DB corrected manually.

status_changes.note: WA/WEM project — status and cod_current corrected in DB (was stale from NEM-only AEMO data).
500 MW — first 250 MW tranche commissioning from Mar 2026, full operations targeted Jun 2026.
510 MW — AEMO still shows commissioning as at Jan 2026 Gen Info.

nem_records.note: NEW RECORD — up from 2,906.2 MW on 2026-04-02 (+9.7%). Driven by QLD1 peak of 1,398.8 MW.
NEW RECORD — up from 14,497.0 MWh on 2026-04-13 (+4.1%).

updates.data_quality_notes: Dispatch Region Sum and band capture tables current to March 2026 — NEMWEB MMSDM archives for April/May not yet published by AEMO (normal ~4-6 week lag). Re-run import_dispatch_regionsum.py, import_bess_band_capture.py, and import_price_band_capture.py in late May/early June once archives are available. Battery SCADA current to May 10, BESS 5-min peaks current to May 9.
bugs_fixed: import_openelectricity.py: removed redundant local 'from datetime import timedelta' that shadowed top-level import, causing UnboundLocalError on line 117.
db_corrections: collie-battery: cod_current changed from '2027' to '2025-07' in both overlay and DB. Status changed from 'development' to 'operating' in DB.
